highlights.summary: Replaces the Treatments view gating for the bolus-in-progress card to rely on the local bolus progress signal instead of the pump-mirrored bolusStatus. The change introduces a bolusInProgressForEntry computed property that checks (state.bolusProgress != nil || state.bolusStatus == .initiating) and uses it for both displaying the bolus progress UI and disabling the task button; the previous carb/fat/protein dependency was removed from the gate (commit:3010265b28f8, diff:aa5ad5630445, commit:f6c21a412803). The PR and commit messages explain this addresses cases where a bolusing card could get stuck at 0% and block further boluses until app restart (pr:gordolio/Trio#1320, commit:3010265b28f8).
highlights.userFacingImpact: Fixes an issue where a bolus-in-progress card in the Treatments view could remain stuck at 0%, block further boluses, and require an app restart to clear; the UI now gates on the reliably-cleared local bolusProgress signal and still preserves the initiating pre-delivery state so the pre-delivery view continues to show (pr:gordolio/Trio#1320, commit:3010265b28f8, diff:aa5ad5630445).

items.summary: Bumped APP_DEV_VERSION in Config.xcconfig from 0.8.4.21 to 0.8.4.22. The change is shown in the commit diff and file update (diff:ce34f0f08af7, file:3ea3d356c0a8, commit:145107726be7).
items.userFacingImpact: No evidence in the provided change indicates any functional or runtime behavior change; this appears to be a development/version metadata bump in CI/config (file:3ea3d356c0a8, diff:ce34f0f08af7).

includedPullRequests.title: Make bolus-in-progress card in Treatments view more reliable
includedPullRequests.body:
Some manual boluses left a bolusing card stuck at 0% in the Treatments view that blocked further boluses and could not be dismissed until the app was restarted (#1308).

The card was gated on bolusStatus, which mirrors the pump's reported bolusState and can stay at inProgress after delivery has finished. Since bolusTrigger now retains that value, the card resurfaced once a new amount was entered, and the X could not clear it because there was no active bolus to cancel.

Gate the card on bolusProgress instead, the local dose reporter signal that clears reliably and that the Home view already uses, keeping the initiating state so the pre-delivery view still shows.

Gate the card on bolusProgress instead, the local dose reporter signal that clears reliably and that the Home view already uses, keeping the initiating state so the pre-delivery view still shows.
